title: PaymentBehavior
description: Historical metrics capturing a partner's credit-payment behavior, average delays, dunning stages, and collection histories.

x-opo-erp-mappings.SAP_S4: KNB5 (Dunning Data per Customer) / UKM_SGM (repayment records)
x-opo-erp-mappings.Protheus: SA1 (A1_MSEG repayment tracking, A1_MATR average delays)
x-opo-erp-mappings.NetSuite: Customer payment performance history / days overdue

x-opo-ai-discovery-hints: Look up average payment delay for this client.
Verify dunning status or days sales outstanding.
Has the customer received collection warnings?
Find collection letter history in CustCollectionLetterJour.
